name: Russian Tea# 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large container and stir thoroughly until dissolved.
2. Store the mixture in an airtight jar.
3. To prepare, add 3 to 4 teaspoons of the mixture to each glass filled with hot or cold water. Adjust the amount according to taste preferences.
From: VIP Cookbook, 1977, American Cancer Society.
